name: Carbon Fiber Front Splitter
shortDescription: Lightweight carbon fiber front splitter designed for improved downforce and aggressive aesthetics.
description: Engineered in-house using aerospace-grade carbon fiber prepreg, our front splitter delivers measurable aerodynamic downforce while maintaining a clean, OEM-integrated look. Each unit is designed using CFD analysis and hand-finished to exacting tolerances. Available for a range of performance platforms.

name: Telamorph Roof Box R1
shortDescription: Aerodynamic carbon fiber roof box for sports cars and performance SUVs.
description: The R1 is our flagship roof box — designed, prototyped, and manufactured entirely in-house. Built from forged carbon fiber with an aerodynamically optimised profile, it adds storage without compromising your vehicle's performance or silhouette. Wind-tunnel tested, UV-resistant, and IP65 rated.

name: EQ8 Precision Telescope Mount
shortDescription: Heavy-duty equatorial mount with sub-arcsecond tracking for observatory-grade imaging.
description: Designed for serious astrophotographers and remote observatory setups, the EQ8 mount combines a rigid steel framework with precision harmonic drive gearing and integrated GPS/autoguiding. The entire drive system is engineered and assembled in our facility, ensuring traceable quality and long-term reliability.

name: Precision Torque Sensor PT-500
shortDescription: High-accuracy torque measurement for industrial and test applications.
description: The PT-500 Precision Torque Sensor delivers laboratory-grade accuracy in a rugged, industrial-ready package. Designed for inline and reaction torque measurement, it features a full-bridge strain gauge configuration with built-in signal conditioning. Ideal for automotive test rigs, production line QC, and R&D environments.

name: Custom Jig & Fixture Design
shortDescription: End-to-end design and manufacture of custom jigs, fixtures, and tooling.
description: From concept sketch to production-ready tooling, our Development & Production team delivers precision jigs and fixtures tailored to your manufacturing workflow. Using 3D scanning, reverse engineering, and CNC machining, we ensure perfect fit and repeatable accuracy. Ideal for low-to-mid volume production runs.
